description: Accounts of a druggist. In the hand of the court clerk Yosef b. Shemuel b. Saʿadya ha-Levi (ca. 1181–1209 CE). Containing names of persons to whom sold, prices and weights. (Information from Goitein's index cards.) Very similar to T-S AS 152.131 + T-S AS 149.16 (PGPID 4173) and possibly a join.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
